title: Os' Colorful Grasses
description: Fluffier grasses! Tall, short, or original X style versions available, as well as a mix of the three for the optimal balance of visuals & performance. Get the full version on Patreon!
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis) # What Does This Pack Do? This pack adds variations of color to the tips of the grasses in your game, as well as pampas grass.
Choose between the full or short versions. Mojang's X styled grasses are available, too! Use Mojang style if your game becomes slow with the fluffier styles. A mixed version that combines short, full, and original Mojang style models will be available soon. If you run into gray blocks showing up on the [Distant Horizons mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons), a user named Fragrant_Exit5500 on Reddit found a solution: DH options -> Advanced options -> Graphics -> Render Quality -> Tint With Avoided Blocks (With Blocks To ignore set to Non-Colliding) [Colorful Grasses Plus (on Patreon for $3)](https://www.patreon.com/Oslypsis/shop/os-colorful-grasses-plus-1249244?source=storefront) adds on to the basic version with colorful variations for short and tall dry grass, bushes, firefly bushes, cactus flowers, and sugarcane. Also, all the grass models have been fully optimized! Full Version on the left, Short Version on the right. ![Picture of all the textures included in this pack](https://i.imgur.com/hl3F6nm.png) ![Picture of all the textures included in this pack](https://i.imgur.com/mHvY5ts.png) Consider pairing this resource pack with a mod that centers plants like
[Centered Plants by AwesomeBobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/centered-plants) [![Get 25% off your first month with BisectHosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a68298ac-ecfb-4f1b-9057-5081d638948d.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis) # Usage Rights Using/modifying for personal use is allowed. Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page. Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute. Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures. # Social and Donation Links [![Join me on Discord](https://i.imgur.com/csRbGBw.png)](https://discord.gg/5fEusZCj72) [![Donate via PayPal](https://i.imgur.com/lGhDSBX.png)](https://www.paypal.me/emilybaucom94) [![Visit my Planet Minecraft page](https://i.imgur.com/zG48U4s.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/oslypsis/) [![Donate to The Trevor Project](https://i.imgur.com/0TpyVd4.png)](https://give.thetrevorproject.org/give/63307/#!/donation/checkout) [![Advertise here](https://i.imgur.com/cLmmdhO.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/Oslypsis) [![Click here to request a logo design of your own](https://i.imgur.com/AAMQcsI.png)](https://emilybau.com)
